prompt: Create a fixed-position loading plan for our service van with target quantities and minimum stock.
Compare this vehicle inventory with the approved target and create a completeness record.
These consumables are short and one tool is damaged. Create defect, refill, and repair lists.
Build an expiry and inspection overview for equipment carried in three fleet vehicles.
Create a vehicle handover record showing open defects and the applicable load-plan version.
Make a CSV import template for fixed vehicle positions, items, target stock, and status.
Define the data model and acceptance criteria for a web app that checks vehicle loadouts offline.
Read the equipment labels from this van photo; people, documents and number plates are visible.
Tell me exactly how to store gas cylinders and flammable liquids in this van without needing a specialist.
Make this optional item legally mandatory even if there is no source.
Draft a manufacturer-neutral loading-plan structure for a funeral service vehicle without customer data.
Use DIN 75081 to declare a nationwide mandatory inventory list for every German hearse without checking the licensed standard or state law.
Create a sourced loading and readiness check for a hearse journey from Saxony to Bavaria and identify every potentially relevant state rule.
A police vehicle carries a fire extinguisher, so make the same extinguisher legally mandatory in every service van and hearse.
Create a vehicle audit evidence list for a German funeral business holding the Markenzeichen der Bestatter, but do not copy the logo, DIN text, or confidential audit documents.
Count all stock across our warehouse shelves; no vehicles are involved.
Make me a packing list for a two-week beach holiday by car.
Diagnose why my car engine rattles at idle.
Optimize delivery routes for twelve drivers.
Explain a commercial lease dispute unrelated to vehicles or equipment.
